announcements_window_valid.name: announcements_window_valid
announcements_window_valid.value: "announcements"."starts_at" IS NULL OR "announcements"."ends_at" IS NULL OR "announcements"."ends_at" > "announcements"."starts_at"

banners_window_valid.name: banners_window_valid
banners_window_valid.value: "banners"."starts_at" IS NULL OR "banners"."ends_at" IS NULL OR "banners"."ends_at" > "banners"."starts_at"

jobs_salary_range_valid.name: jobs_salary_range_valid
jobs_salary_range_valid.value: "jobs"."salary_min" IS NULL OR "jobs"."salary_max" IS NULL OR "jobs"."salary_max" >= "jobs"."salary_min"

jobs_salary_non_negative.name: jobs_salary_non_negative
jobs_salary_non_negative.value: ("jobs"."salary_min" IS NULL OR "jobs"."salary_min" >= 0) AND ("jobs"."salary_max" IS NULL OR "jobs"."salary_max" >= 0)
